bird.summary: The thick-billed kingbird (Tyrannus crassirostris) is a large member of the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in the s…

locations.name: 恰帕斯州
locations.summary: 恰帕斯州（西班牙語：Chiapas），正式名称为恰帕斯自由和主权州（Estado Libre y Soberano de Chiapas），是墨西哥的一個州，位於該國東南部。東臨瓜地馬拉，南臨太平洋。 整體屬熱帶濕潤氣候。北部靠近塔巴斯科…

relations.subject: Thick-billed kingbird
relations.evidence: | pages =412–413 }} The subspecies has also strayed further north in Arizona and to British Colombia, California, Colorado, and Baja California. The nominate subspecies is found on the western side of Mexico from Colima south to Chiapas and occasionally occurs in western Guatemala. The thick-billed kingbird inhabits different landscapes in different parts of its range

relations.subject: Thick-billed kingbird
relations.evidence: Further south it is found within tropical deciduous forest and less frequently in riparian zones and in the far south it is found in riparian zones within arid scrublands. In elevation it ranges as high as
